channel.title: Linux on Pranav Gore | Senior Backend Engineer
channel.description: Recent content in Linux on Pranav Gore | Senior Backend Engineer

item.title: Video File Operations with FFmpeg
item.description: Common FFmpeg video processing operations: trimming, merging, format conversion, resolution scaling, and extracting audio from video files.

item.title: X virtual framebuffer (Xvfb)
item.description: What Xvfb (X Virtual Framebuffer) is, how it works, and how to use it to run GUI applications in headless Linux environments for CI/CD pipelines and testing.

item.title: Update golang version on Fedora
item.description: How to safely update your Go installation on Fedora Linux while keeping the old version as a fallback.
